overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a foggy nighttime rooftop settlement with palm trees, neon-lit structures, and distant fires. The player moves through a crowd near a bar area before approaching an industrial edge overlooking lower levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy rooftop approach with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a foggy concrete path toward a distant orange glow

entered.detail: tall palm tree silhouettes against the foggy night sky
large circular ferris wheel structure visible through the haze
intense orange fire illuminating the fog from a distant structure
low concrete barriers lining the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy rooftop path with palm tree silhouettes visible on the sides. The distant orange glow of a large fire illuminates the hazy night sky ahead, with a ferris wheel structure barely visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop settlement plaza with neon bar

events.description: entering the populated rooftop settlement area with illuminated structures
approaching the neon-lit bar area with purple and orange lights

agents.ego_description: moving through a gathering of people near a bar with neon lighting and fire barrels

notable_agents.action: standing near a burning fire barrel
tending the bar counter with neon lights

entered.detail: tall white metal framework structure illuminated with bright lights resembling a tree
bar area with colorful purple and orange neon lighting
metal barrels burning with orange flames providing warmth and light
safety railings along the edge of the rooftop plaza

segments.scene_description: Entering a populated rooftop plaza featuring a distinctive illuminated tree structure and a bar with colorful neon lights. People gather around fire barrels while the camera moves through the scattered crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit bar passage with wet concrete

events.description: passing close to the neon bar with purple and orange reflections on wet ground
turning slightly toward the industrial edge of the rooftop

agents.ego_description: passing the neon bar and continuing toward the edge of the rooftop settlement

notable_agents.action: standing by the bar counter with drinks

entered.detail: metal scaffolding structures along the building edge
piles of wooden pallets and construction supplies

segments.scene_description: Moving past the neon-lit bar area with wet reflective concrete underfoot. The crowd thins as the camera approaches the industrial edge of the rooftop, passing scaffolding and construction materials.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial edge overlooking lower construction level

events.description: reaching the edge and overlooking the lower industrial level with construction cranes
red construction warning lights become visible in the fog below

agents.ego_description: approaching the edge and looking down at the lower industrial area with construction cranes and red warning lights

entered.detail: tall construction crane with bright red warning lights blinking in the fog
industrial structures visible through the deep fog below the rooftop edge
rising smoke from fires in the lower level industrial area

segments.scene_description: Reaching the edge of the rooftop and looking down into a foggy industrial pit with red construction lights and cranes. The dense fog obscures the lower levels while smoke rises from distant fires, creating a dystopian atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy rooftop settlement that transitions from a desolate, foggy path into a vibrant, populated plaza. It begins by gliding along a misty walkway flanked by the dark silhouettes of palm trees, moving toward the distant orange glow of a large fire and the faint outline of a ferris wheel. As the camera advances, the dense fog begins to thin, revealing the glowing lights of a social hub. The scene then opens into a crowded plaza centered around a distinctive illuminated tree and a neon-lit bar, where the camera weaves through groups of people gathered around burning fire barrels.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit social hub toward the bleak, industrial precipice of a rooftop settlement. It begins by gliding past a crowded bar area where wet concrete reflects the surrounding neon lights, moving steadily forward as the crowd thins. As the camera passes through a corridor of scaffolding and construction materials, the atmosphere shifts from urban nightlife to a raw industrial zone. The scene then opens up at the rooftop's edge, looking down into a deep, foggy pit illuminated by red construction lights and towering cranes. Finally, the view expands to reveal a dystopian landscape where dense fog and rising smoke from distant fires obscure the lower levels of the city.
